methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Anello Photonics, a Series B-2 stage company in Defense & Security founded by Mario Paniccia and Mike Horton, has raised $50M+ to date. The valuation universe for this stage and sector comprises 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers, including Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems. The broader Defense & Security sector includes 19 identified peers.

The peer-median method proved inapplicable due to insufficient narrow-set filtering. Despite 19 same-sector peers existing, zero companies met the combined criteria of matching stage, adjacent stage, or similar valuation tier simultaneously. Applying an all-sector median would introduce material distortion given the heterogeneity of Defense & Security subsegments and the risk profile variance across stages. The public comparables and top-tier private peers remain relevant for directional benchmarking, but their valuation multiples and stage transitions cannot be mechanically applied without additional company-specific metrics on revenue, growth rate, and margin profile.

A defensible valuation range cannot be established from the data provided. Further analysis requires either: (1) disclosed financials or revenue multiples from the identified public and private peers, (2) stage-appropriate EV/revenue or EV/EBITDA benchmarks within narrower Defense & Security subsegments, or (3) transaction multiples from recent Series B or B-2 exits in this sector. Current data supports peer identification only; triangulation remains pending.
